name: Privacy Preserving Recommender Systems Balancing Personalization with Privacy
summary: arXiv:2607.13328v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Personalized recommendation systems are central to modern e-commerce and retail platforms, but they typically rely on centralized storage of detail...
description: arXiv:2607.13328v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Personalized recommendation systems are central to modern e-commerce and retail platforms, but they typically rely on centralized storage of detailed user interaction data, creating significant privacy and regulatory challenges. With increasing requirements from regulations such as GDPR, CCPA, and CPRA, organizations must develop recommendation...
author: Ranjeet K Jha, Venkata Suresh Gummadilli
